Organization portal volunteer applicatio: Review requests from volunteers for your events that require approval before they can join the roster.
Organization portal events hint: Create and manage events for your organization. Volunteers discover them on the public opportunities list when the event is open.
Organization portal events dashboard hin: List, edit, and create events scoped to your organization.
Organization portal event roster hint: Volunteers who joined this event’s roster. Status shows attendance progress when a record exists. Coordinators and above can remove someone who has not checked in yet. Use contact details only for legitimate program coordination.
No volunteers on the roster yet.
Organization portal roster export filter: Download includes only volunteers matching your current search.
Cannot delete event with volunteers or a: You cannot delete this event while it has volunteers on the roster or any attendance records. Remove roster members first, or contact platform staff if you need the event archived.
Remove volunteer from roster confirm: Remove this volunteer from the event roster? They can join again later if the opportunity allows.
This volunteer is not on the roster for: This volunteer is not on the roster for this event.
Cannot remove a volunteer who already ha: This volunteer already has attendance activity for this event and cannot be removed from the roster here. Contact platform staff if a correction is needed.
Organization portal event organization h: This event belongs to your organization.
Application required hint organization p: Volunteers must be approved in Organization → Applications before they can join the roster.
You are signing in to the staff admin ar: You are signing in to the staff admin area.
I agree to the Terms and Privacy policy.
SwaedUAE Association for Culture and Com: SwaedUAE Association for Culture and Community Empowerment
Official bilingual institutional website: Official bilingual institutional website with an integrated volunteering platform.
About, leadership, programs, media, part: About, leadership, programs, media, partners, and contact—coming in Phase 2.
QR check-in/out with GPS and geofence va: QR check-in/out with GPS and geofence validation—Phase 1 vertical slice.
Browse opportunities, apply, and track a: Browse opportunities, apply, and track attendance and hours. Full flows ship in later phases.
Volunteer attendance hint: Browse opportunities, apply, and track attendance and hours. Check-in uses a signed link or QR from your coordinator: log in as a rostered volunteer, open the link, and allow GPS.
Allow location access to validate check-: Allow location access to validate check-in against the event geofence.
Attendance checkpoint session hint: After opening this page, complete check-in or check-out within about 20 minutes. If the page sits idle longer, open the link from your coordinator again.
Tap refresh to capture your location bef: Tap “Refresh GPS” to capture your location before using check-in or check-out.
Updates your coordinates for the buttons: Updates your coordinates for the check-in and check-out buttons below.
GPS permission was denied. Enable locati: GPS permission was denied. Enable location for this site in your browser settings, then tap Refresh GPS.
GPS position could not be determined. Mo: GPS position could not be determined. Move outdoors or near a window, then try again.
GPS timed out. Check signal, disable bat: GPS timed out. Check signal, disable battery saver if needed, then tap Refresh GPS.
You appear to be offline. Connect to the: You appear to be offline. Connect to the internet, then refresh this page.
This device does not support location.
Open the check-in link from the QR code: Open the check-in link from the QR code again.
This check-in link expired. Scan the QR: This check-in link expired. Scan the QR again.
You are not registered for this event.
CMS-driven program cards will appear her: CMS-driven program cards will appear here.
Volunteer step register: Register and verify your volunteer profile.
Volunteer step attend: Check in with the signed link or QR and validated GPS.
Placeholder card body: Summary and CTA will come from the CMS.
FAQ sample question: How do I check in to an event?
FAQ sample answer: Use the signed link or QR from your coordinator while logged in, allow GPS, and tap Check in on the attendance page.
Youth councils contact intro: For questions about Youth Councils and our association’s work in this area, please write to the dedicated inbox below.
Youth councils contact general hint: For general enquiries, partnerships, or media, you may also use the main Contact page. For volunteer accounts, login, or attendance help, use Help & support.
Contact intro: Send us a message — we typically reply within a few business days.
Contact routes to info: Submissions go to our public inbox for general questions, partnerships, and media.
Contact also see support: Volunteer platform, login, registration, attendance, or organization account help:
Support intro: Use this form for volunteer accounts, organization portal access, login issues, check-in or attendance problems, and certificates. We typically reply within a few business days.
A new organization has registered and is: A new organization has registered and is pending verification.
Name: Name

Thank you. We will get back to you soon.
Mission placeholder: Detailed mission copy will be managed in the CMS.
Leadership page note: Board and leadership profiles will be added as a dedicated section.
HTTPS URL or site path (e.g. /images/og.jpg). ~1200×630. Empty uses DEFAULT_OG_IMAGE_URL if set.
Required for public visibility when stat: Required for public visibility when status is Published.
Visitors only see this page when it is p: Visitors only see this page when it is published with a past or current publish date.
When published, this page can appear in: When published, this page can appear in the featured strip on the home page.
When published, list this page in the “F: When published, list this page in the “Featured program pages” grid on /programs (institutional slugs are excluded from the grid automatically).
When published, list this page in the Me: When published, list this page in the Media center “Our news” stream and home “Latest news” teasers (institutional slugs never appear there).
Allow partial locale publish: Allow publishing with incomplete other language (explicit exception)
Allow partial locale publish help: Default: both English and Arabic pages for this slug must exist with title and body before either can be Published. Check this only when stakeholders approve a single-language release.
Cannot publish until the matching :local: Cannot publish until the matching :locale page exists for this slug.
Cannot publish until the :locale version: Cannot publish until the :locale version has a title and body.

Volunteer opportunities intro: Open roles and activities you can join. Full applications and rostering will expand in later releases.
Check back soon or contact us to get inv: Check back soon or contact us to get involved.
Exact coordinates are used only for GPS: Exact coordinates are used only for GPS check-in validation for volunteers on the roster.
You are on the roster for this opportuni: You are on the roster for this opportunity.
You joined this opportunity. Use check-i: You joined this opportunity. Use check-in from your coordinator when the window opens.

Events you have joined from the opportun: Events you have joined from the opportunities list.
Opens a secure link valid for 7 days—sam: Opens a secure link valid for 7 days—same technology as QR codes from your coordinator.
Leave this opportunity? You can join aga: Leave this opportunity? You can join again before the event starts if slots allow.

Events you were rostered on that have en: Events you were rostered on that have ended.
This opportunity is no longer open for j: This opportunity is no longer open for joining.
Attendance checkpoint hint: Rostered volunteers must be signed in. The GET link is signed and expires after the chosen number of days; after opening it, check-in/out must complete within about 20 minutes (session gate). POST uses GPS validation.
Signed URL (encode in QR or share): Signed URL (encode in QR or share)
Leave blank for unlimited roster size.
The check-in window must end on or after: The check-in window must end on or after the event start time.
The check-in window must start on or bef: The check-in window must start on or before the event end time.
Cannot delete an organization that still: Cannot delete an organization that still has events.
Volunteers must be approved by an admin: Volunteers must be approved by an admin before they can join the roster.
Only pending applications can be updated: Only pending applications can be updated.
This opportunity requires admin approval: This opportunity requires admin approval before you can join the roster.
Your application was approved. You can j: Your application was approved. You can join the roster below.
You need an approved application before: You need an approved application before you can join this roster.
Applications you submitted for events th: Applications you submitted for events that require approval.
Mail body event application approved: Good news — your application for “:event” was approved.
Mail body event application approved nex: You can now join the roster from the opportunity page when you are ready.
Mail body event application rejected: Your application for “:event” was not approved this time.
Mail body organization approved: Your organization “:org” is now approved on SwaedUAE.
Mail body organization approved next: You can open your organization dashboard to create events and invite your team.
Mail body organization rejected: Your organization registration for “:org” was not approved.
Mail body dispute resolved: Your dispute about hours for “:event” was reviewed and marked resolved.
Mail body dispute dismissed: Your dispute about hours for “:event” was reviewed and closed without a change to the record.
Mail body dispute opened staff intro: A volunteer submitted a dispute about verified attendance. Summary:
Programs card hint: Initiatives and published pages from the CMS.
Attendance history intro: Check-in records and hours from events you joined.
No attendance records match your filters: No attendance records match your filters.
Dispute attendance hint: Describe what looks wrong with this attendance record (at least 20 characters).
Your dispute was submitted. An administr: Your dispute was submitted. An administrator will review it.
No flagged attendance matches your filte: No flagged attendance matches your filters.
Attendance adjustment saved. Volunteer totals use verified minutes.
No check-in attempts match your filters.
Public event volunteer CTA: Log in or create a volunteer profile to join the roster, apply if required, and check in with GPS when your coordinator shares the secure link.
Dashboard hours summary hint: Minutes from completed check-out sessions (GPS-validated attendance). Disputes may adjust records after review.
Account data export hint: Download a machine-readable copy of the account information we hold for you (profile, applications, attendance summaries). Coordinates and full audit history are not included.
Account data export rate hint: Limited to a few downloads per hour to protect your account.
Verify email to export data: Verify your email address to enable data export.
Certificates coming soon message: Downloadable certificates will appear here after the certificate module is enabled.
Stay informed dashboard intro: Control which emails you receive from us on your volunteer profile.
Stay informed in-app note: In-app notifications on this dashboard will be added in a future update.
Search by title or host organization: Search by title or host organization
Volunteer profile intro: This information is required before you can apply to gated opportunities or join an open roster. You can browse listings anytime.
Volunteer profile incomplete banner: Add your bio (at least 20 characters) and emergency contact details to unlock applying and joining rosters.
Profile completion hint: Required fields unlock applications and rosters; optional details help coordinators know you better.
Email me about opportunities and reminde: Email me about opportunities and reminders
Dashboard volunteer profile hint: Complete your volunteer details to apply and join rosters.
Opportunity profile required hint: Complete your volunteer profile to apply or join this opportunity.
Organization registration subtitle: Create your organization account for review by SwaedUAE.
Organization representative account hint: You will sign in with this account as the organization owner after your email is verified.
Your organization details were sent back for review.
Organization resubmit hint: Update your organization name if needed and resubmit. Our team will review your registration again.
Organization pending verification body: Thank you for registering your organization. Our team will review your application. You can sign in anytime to check this page for updates.
Organization registration rejected body: Your organization registration was not approved. If you have questions, please contact us.
Organization dashboard missing link: No organization linked to this account
Organization dashboard missing link hint: If you believe this is an error, please contact support.
Invite organization staff hint: Send an email invitation with a secure link. The recipient must sign in with the invited email address to accept.
Invitation email sent again with a new link.
Organization invitation invalid hint: This link may have expired or was already used. Ask your organization owner to send a new invitation.
Organization invitation wrong account: This invitation was sent to :email. You are signed in with a different account.
Organization invitation wrong account hi: Sign out and sign in with the invited email, or contact your organization owner.
Organization invitation other org body: Your account is already linked to another organization. You cannot join a second organization with the same profile.
Organization invitation other org hint: Use a different email address, or ask an administrator for help.
You are already a member of this organization.
Organization invitation email body: You have been invited to join **:org** as **:role**. Click the button below to accept.
You cannot invite your own account email: You cannot invite your own account email.
